---
title: "IEA Statistics Package"
page-layout: article
---

# IEA Statistics Package

## Description

Energy statistics resource from the International Energy Agency. Supports research on energy production, consumption, trade, prices, and energy policy across countries.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](https://guides.library.yale.edu/iea)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
